industry: Public swimming pool / events venue / staycation

system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Weddings, birthdays, and pool bookings pile up on Messenger — see the calendar fill and confirm event dates without double-booking.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial quotation sent 2026-07-21 via outreachSchedule; auto follow-ups 3d1w (max 4).

sources.address: Chico Street, Torres Subd., San Jose, Rodriguez, Philippines, 1850
sources.intro: Swimming Sports Facility, Events Place for Weddings, Birthdays, Parties, Forums...
sources.notes: Night swimming temporarily not available starting June 30 (FB post). HD assets from Facebook Photos via Chrome DevTools MCP + signed fbcdn download. Hero 1920×1795, gallery up to 1920×1795 / 844×1440 / 1200×1200, logo 908×908.
